implemented_contract.text_discovery: Each unique governed text concept uses the exact public multiplex text prompt and returns every nonempty instance mask with score, object ID, concept index, normalized box, and stable instance identity.
implemented_contract.point_refinement: Positive and negative pixel prompts are normalized and sent through the exact public multiplex point API for object 1.
implemented_contract.box_translation: A box-only refinement becomes one deterministic center positive point; the result is clipped to the exact ROI and empty clips fail closed.
implemented_contract.mask_translation: A hash-bound mask prior becomes the in-mask pixel nearest its centroid; the result remains a draft and downstream polarity, containment, and repair guards still apply.
implemented_contract.external_exemplar_boundary: The frozen SAM 3.1 multiplex public API exposes no external-exemplar input. Nonempty external exemplar requests are rejected explicitly and cannot be silently ignored or misreported as used.
implemented_contract.artifact: Closed masks/object_ids/probabilities/boxes_xywh/concept_indices NPZ, loaded with allow_pickle=false and independently verified for hashes, types, shapes, finite normalized geometry, nonempty masks, and result count.
implemented_contract.report: Closed JSON binds source, runtime lock, requirements, checkpoint, request, original RGB, encoded frame, prompt artifact, output artifact, payload, exact builder/version, translation mode, latency, VRAM, and authority.
implemented_contract.production_integration: Default lazy official loaders are bound behind the existing S06 shadow discovery, S07/S08 provider-neutral interactive path, and S11 repair sidecar. Planned lifecycle still skips execution; runnable lifecycle uses the real loader.
implemented_contract.failure_behavior: Missing inputs, timeout, nonzero subprocess including preserved CUDA OOM text, provenance drift, prompt drift, malformed output, authority drift, and artifact drift fail closed.
